subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The Sun of Divine Wisdom is occupied with the education of the peoples of the world, and the Ocean of God's knowledge doth bestow its boundless grace [3.5s]... ...Cleave thou to the fear of God and to whatsoever hath been revealed in His Book: thus biddeth thee He Who is the Word of Truth and the Knower of things unseen
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله آفتاب حکمت الهی در تربیت اهل عالم مشغول و دریای علم لدنی بفیض کلی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the power of words; of speech, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
